scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:e2e
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run check:rust
scripts.check:ci: bun run check && bun run check:bundle && bun run check:schema && bun run check:docs && bun run check:security && bun run check:actions
scripts.check:rust: bun run check:rust:fmt && bun run check:rust:check && bun run check:rust:clippy
scripts.check:rust:fmt: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:fmt --cwd src-tauri -- cargo fmt -p RapidRAW -- --check
scripts.check:rust:check: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:check --cwd src-tauri -- cargo check --locked --no-default-features --features required-ci
scripts.check:rust:clippy: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label rust:clippy --cwd src-tauri -- cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --no-default-features --features required-ci -- -D warnings -W clippy::redundant_clone
scripts.check:bundle: bun run build && bun tests/integration/checks/check-vite-production-payload.ts && bun tests/integration/checks/check-vite-bundle-budget.ts && bun scripts/generate-vite-bundle-report.ts
scripts.check:schema: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label schema:types -- tsc -p packages/rawengine-schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-samples.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-sample-artifacts.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-edit-graph-migrations.ts && bun tests/integration/checks/check-schema-production-boundary.ts && bun packages/rawengine-schema/scripts/check-edit-command-bus.ts
scripts.check:docs: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label docs:format -- biome ci --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false docs && bun tests/integration/checks/check-markdown-links.ts
scripts.check:security: bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label security:js -- bun audit --audit-level moderate && bun tests/integration/checks/check-rust-advisory-waivers.ts && bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label security:rust --cwd src-tauri -- cargo audit --ignore RUSTSEC-2024-0429
scripts.lint: bun scripts/check-folder-file-counts.ts && bun scripts/run-compact-command.ts --label lint -- biome ci --formatter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false .
